tags.name: Authentication Management
tags.description: APIs related to user authentication, authorization, OTP verification, and password management

tags.name: Profile Management
tags.description: APIs related to user profile operations such as profile picture upload and deletion

put.description: Updates the details of an existing category belonging to the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Returns the updated CategoryResponse object on success.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., missing or malformed data)

404.description: Category not found for the given id

delete.description: Deletes an existing category belonging to the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Returns no content on successful deletion.

404.description: Category not found for the given id

post.description:
Uploads or replaces the authenticated user's profile picture.
Only image files are allowed.
The previous profile picture (if any) will be replaced.

400.description: Invalid file or unsupported file type

delete.description:
Deletes the authenticated user's profile picture.
If no profile picture exists, operation is idempotent.

post.description: Creates a new Ledger user and return the created user

get.description: Fetches a paginated list of expenses for the authenticated user. Supports pagination, sorting, and optional filtering by date range and category.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of items to be returned in a page

403.description: User not authorized to access these expenses

post.description: creates a new expense entry for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Get categories of the logged in user
get.description: Fetches a CategoryResponse Object from the database. With a default page value 0 & page size 10

200.description: Categories created by the logged in user

post.summary: Create a new Category for the logged in user
post.description:
Creates a new category associated with the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken.
Returns the created CategoryResponse object on success.

post.summary: Set a monthly budget for the logged-in user
post.description: Creates a new monthly budget associated with the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Returns the created BudgetResponse object on success.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., missing or malformed data)

get.summary: Get the default budget of the logged-in user
get.description: Fetches the default budget associated with the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Returns the BudgetResponse object if a default budget is set.

404.description: No default budget found for the user

post.summary: Set a default budget for the logged-in user
post.description: Creates or updates the default budget for the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Returns the BudgetResponse object representing the default budget.

400.description: Invalid request (e.g., missing or malformed data)

post.description: Verifies the one-time password (OTP) for a given accessToken. Returns verification status and related details.

Resets user password using a valid reset token.
Typically used after initiating the forgot password flow.
Resends a new OTP to the specified email address if the previous OTP expired or was not received.

400.description: Invalid email format or missing email parameter

404.description: User with the given email not found

500.description: Internal server error while resending OTP

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided registration details. Returns the registered user information upon successful creation.

409.description: User with the same email/username already exists.

post.description:
Generates a new access token using refresh token
stored in HttpOnly cookies.
Generates new access and refresh tokens using a valid refresh token.
Authenticates a user with their credentials. Returns an access accessToken and a refresh accessToken on successful authentication.

Authenticates user credentials for web applications.
        - Access token is returned in response body
        - Refresh token is stored in an HttpOnly cookie

Authenticates user for mobile clients.
Access and refresh tokens are returned in response body.

Authenticates or registers a user using Google OAuth.
Accepts a Google ID token obtained from the frontend.

Initiates the password reset flow.
Sends a password reset link or OTP to the registered email address.
This endpoint is public.

404.description: User with given email not found

patch.description: Updates a existing ledger user and return the updated user

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific expense belonging to the authenticated user.

403.description: Forbidden – user not allowed to access this expense

404.description: Expense not found for the given ID

delete.description: Deletes an expense for the authenticated user based on the provided expense ID.

403.description: User not authorized to delete this expense

patch.description: Updates an existing expense belonging to the authenticated user.

400.description: Invalid input (e.g., bad request body or negative ID)

403.description: Forbidden – user not allowed to update this expense

404.description: Expense not found for the given ID

409.description: Conflict – update not allowed due to business rule violation

patch.description: Allows an authenticated user to change their password

get.summary: Get budget for the current month or Get the default budget
get.description: Fetches a user BudgetResponse Object from the database using the provided month

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Any ISO date within the target month

200.description: BudgetResponse object for the provided month

get.summary: Get all override budgets of the logged-in user
get.description: Fetches a paginated list of override budgets created by the authenticated user. Requires a valid authentication accessToken. Defaults to page=0 and size=10 if not provided.

200.description: Paginated list of override budgets retrieved successfully

get.description: Fetches paginated budget history for the authenticated user.

403.description: Forbidden - User not allowed to access this resource

delete.description:
Permanently deletes the budget for the specified month for the authenticated user.
The `month` path variable must be an ISO-8601 date (`yyyy-MM-dd`).
Recommended: use the first day of the month (e.g., `2025-08-01`).

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Any ISO date within the target month

400.description: Invalid month format or month out of allowed range

403.description: Forbidden – user not allowed to delete this budget

404.description: Budget for the given month not found

409.description: Conflict – deletion blocked by business rule (e.g., locked/approved month)
